item.label: [PKT-FND-002](task-0033): Schema Package and Fixtures
item.summary: Create schema package with valid and invalid fixtures

body:
# Description

Create schema package with valid and invalid fixtures.

# [PKT-FND-002](task-0023): Schema Package and Fixtures

## Purpose

Create the schema package with valid and invalid fixtures for validation.

## Scope

- JSON schema definitions
- Valid fixture set
- Invalid fixture set
- Schema versioning

## Implementation

1. Define all JSON schemas
2. Create valid fixture examples
3. Create invalid fixture examples
4. Implement schema versioning

## Acceptance Criteria

1. All schemas defined and versioned
2. Valid fixtures pass validation
3. Invalid fixtures fail validation
